description: Links patent applications to NACE Rev. 2 industry classification codes, indicating relevant economic sectors and industries.

columns.name: appln_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the patent application.

columns.name: nace2_code
columns.description: NACE Rev. 2 industry classification code assigned to the application.

columns.name: weight
columns.description: Weight indicating the relative importance or relevance of this NACE code to the application.
